title: Personal Blog & Portfolio
description: This very site — a personal blog and portfolio built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and TypeScript.
content:
# Personal Blog & Portfolio

This is the source of the site you are looking at right now.

## Stack

Built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, and Bun as the runtime.

## Features

- Blog with individual post pages
- Resume with career timeline
- Portfolio showcase with project tiles
- Static generation for all content pages
